enrichment.summary: Kyle documents his second training video, recapping a 4.85-mile run completed in about an hour despite being physically exhausted from an 85-mile bike ride the day before. He discusses his asthma, his slow running pace, and his philosophy of prioritizing training obsessively over other work like his website.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: avoids resting even if it means incomplete recovery — mentally prefers to keep going
must obsessively prioritize training or he defaults entirely to website work — no natural middle ground
believes stretching is as important as any sport and wants to do three hours a day
swimming and cycling are easier to pick up than running because they are easier on joints
